report.name: MONTHLY_PAYROLL_REPORT
report.description: Monthly payroll summary report with department breakdown

dataset.name: PAYROLL_SUMMARY
dataset.sql: SELECT EMPLOYEE_ID, EMPLOYEE_NAME, MONTHLY_SALARY, ANNUAL_SALARY, JOB_TITLE FROM PAYROLL_VIEW ORDER BY EMPLOYEE_NAME

dataset.name: DEPARTMENT_TOTALS
dataset.sql: SELECT d.DEPARTMENT_NAME, COUNT(e.EMPLOYEE_ID) AS EMP_COUNT, SUM(e.SALARY) AS TOTAL_SALARY FROM EMPLOYEES e JOIN DEPARTMENTS d ON e.DEPARTMENT_ID = d.DEPARTMENT_ID GROUP BY d.DEPARTMENT_NAME
